basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Coordinator, Data Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Project Coordinator & Data Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aiimsrishikesh.edu.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Rishikesh Project Coordinator & Data Manager Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit for all posts: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Public Health/Hospital Administration/MBA with Data Analytics, SPSS, Python, Advance Excel
qualification.details: Project Coordinator: 1st Class Masters in Public Health/ Masters of Hospital Administration/Relevant to Public Health; 5-8 years of experience in progressive role; Ability to design and execute independent research studies/policy-centered work; Ability to work in a diverse inter-disciplinary environment and provide guidance to other members; The Project Coordinator will be responsible for field-level data collection, supervision of data quality across all study sites, data analysis, and preparation of technical reports and manuscripts. Desirable: PHD Biostatistics & Demography; Experience in public policy, governance, or health systems, preferably with state government, international agencies, or leading academic institutions; Strong understanding of civil registration systems, gender rights frameworks and the Transgender Persons Act; Proven experience in drafting policy documents, regulatory SOPs, and legislative briefs; Excellent writing, communication, and facilitation skills in English, Hindi and Regional Language; Min. 5 (PubMed) publications. Data Manager: 1st Class Masters in Public Health/Relevant to Public Health/A Master of Business Administration (MBA) with a focus on data analytics; 5-8 years of experience in progressive role; Certificate Diploma or Hand-on experience in SPSS, Python and Advance Excel. Desirable: 3 to 5 years of experience exclusively in data analysis/research or database administration. Soft Skills: Excellent project management, problem-solving, and communication skills to clearly convey technical findings to stakeholders.

salary_details.details: Project Coordinator: Rs. 80000/- (10% TDS Deduction) Per Month Data Manager: Rs. 60000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Rishikesh Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Rishikesh Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Coordinator: 1st Class Masters in Public Health/ Masters of Hospital Administration/Relevant to Public Health; 5-8 years of experience in progressive role; Ability to design and execute independent research studies/policy-centered work; Ability to work in a diverse inter-disciplinary environment and provide guidance to other members; The Project Coordinator will be responsible for field-level data collection, supervision of data quality across all study sites, data analysis, and preparation of technical reports and manuscripts. Desirable: PHD Biostatistics & Demography; Experience in public policy, governance, or health systems, preferably with state government, international agencies, or leading academic institutions; Strong understanding of civil registration systems, gender rights frameworks and the Transgender Persons Act; Proven experience in drafting policy documents, regulatory SOPs, and legislative briefs; Excellent writing, communication, and facilitation skills in English, Hindi and Regional Language; Min. 5 (PubMed) publications. Data Manager: 1st Class Masters in Public Health/Relevant to Public Health/A Master of Business Administration (MBA) with a focus on data analytics; 5-8 years of experience in progressive role; Certificate Diploma or Hand-on experience in SPSS, Python and Advance Excel. Desirable: 3 to 5 years of experience exclusively in data analysis/research or database administration. Soft Skills: Excellent project management, problem-solving, and communication skills to clearly convey technical findings to stakeholders.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit for all posts: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Project Coordinator: Rs. 80000/- (10% TDS Deduction) Per Month Data Manager: Rs. 60000/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Coordinator post in the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Manager role?
faq.answer: For the Data Manager position, candidates need a 1st Class Masters in Public Health/Relevant to Public Health/MBA with a focus on data analytics, along with experience in SPSS, Python, and Advance Excel.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts advertised by AIIMS Rishikesh is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this AIIMS Rishikesh recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The Project Coordinator will receive a salary of Rs. 80,000/- per month, with a 10% TDS deduction. This is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 will involve a Written Exam followed by an Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply through any mode other than email?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly via email. Candidates must send their applications to the official email address as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these vacancies?
faq.answer: The positions of Project Coordinator and Data Manager are contractual roles. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
